description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a rough, matte orange exterior and a prominent, twisted brown stem at the top. The front face is intricately carved with a menacing expression, featuring sharply angled eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth, giving it a classic jack-o'-lantern appearance. The carved openings reveal a hollow interior, typical of pumpkins prepared for decorative purposes. The surface texture is bumpy and uneven, with natural grooves and dimples characteristic of real pumpkins. The back and sides are uncarved, displaying the natural orange skin uninterrupted. No additional decorative accessories are present, and the pumpkin appears suitable for seasonal urban displays such as on porches or sidewalks.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a twisted brown stem and a menacing jack-o'-lantern face, featuring sharp eyes and a jagged mouth. The surface is rough and bumpy, with the back uncarved.
description_view_0: The front view shows the carved face with sharp, slanted eyes and a jagged mouth, as well as the brown stem.
description_view_1: The right side view reveals the pumpkin's uncarved, textured orange surface and a partial glimpse of the carved face.
description_view_2: The back view displays the fully intact, uncarved orange skin and the stem, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: The left side view shows the uncarved orange surface and a slight edge of the carved mouth, along with the stem.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with sharply angled, menacing eyes and a wide, jagged mouth with pointed teeth. The pattern is bold and expressive, with large cutouts for the facial features.
